/CAL:PTC & ACM ELIG RPT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE FOR THE PURPOSE OF HOME DETENTION AND SHALL COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON  THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED FROM CUSTODY AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL ATTEND ANDCOMPLETE COUNSELING AND GROUPS AS DIRECTED BY THE HARBOR LIGHTS RESIDENTIALTRREATMENT PROGRAM,/WEAP/DEF:IS ADMONISHED BY THE COURT THAT THE CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER ENTERED AT THE TIME OF ARRAIGNMENT REMAINS IN FULL FORCEAND EFFECT,/DEF:CHECK SHALL CHECK-IN WITH THE ACM PROGRAM FIVE TIME PER WEEK,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERS IN FILE,/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT & STATUS OF RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT/DOPU: RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT/

/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION, LD 04-18-22/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 23/TRANS 23:FORTLIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODYHWITH FOR DEFENSE BAIL MOTION AT 1:30PM/X:ALL FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:PRETRIAL & ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/

/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER AS OF 03-15-22/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING//WITEXCL:THE PARTIES/WIT SWORN DA:BRANDON PIPER, A RESIDENT OF SENECA HOTEL/EXHMA:PEO-1, VIDEO INSIDE SENECA HOTEL IDENTIFIED A10 6FL BACKSTAIRS/EXHMA:PEO-2, COLOR PHOTO DEPICTING A DOORWITH A HOLE/EXHMA:PEO-3, COLOR PHOTO OF WHITE WALL WITH A HOLE/EXHMA:PEO-4, COLOR PHOTO OF A SHELL CASING/WIT SWORN DA:KRISTIN BADILLA, HOMELESS OUTREACH SERVICES AT SENECA HOTEL/EXHMA:PEO-5, VIDEO INSIDE SENECA HOTEL IDENTIFIED A20 5TH FL OUTSIDE ELEVATOR//WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER BARTHOLOMEW SULLIVAN,SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPT/EXHMA:PEO-6, COLOR PJHOTO OF A BLACK JACKET RECOVERED FROM TRASH CAN/EXHMA:PRO-7, CERTIFIED COPY OF CI&I DOCUMENT PERTAINING TO DEFENDANT/ /X:THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF DEFENDANT'S BEING ON MISDEMEANOR COURT PROBATION ATTHE TIME OF THIS INCIDENT IN CASE #21006090, THE TERMS OF PROBATION INCLUDED A NO WEAPONS CONDITION,/HTA1: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5/X:THE ALLEGATION AT COUNT 1, PURSUANT TO PC 12022,5(A), BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, IS FOUND TO BE TRUE,/ /CTORD:AS TO COUNT 6, THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED IS SUFFICIENT TO CERTIFY THE MISDEMEANOR CHARGE TO THE SUPERIOR COURT FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS/ /X:THE COURT HEARS THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DETAIN/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/NB/DEFTCUST3/TWA/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED ANDADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:CLERK ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-26-22 (10TH)/LDPX:03-14-22 (60TH)/NB/X:BAIL SET AT NO BAIL WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: MOTION TO DETAIN ON 01-13-22 AND PRELIMINARY HEARING01-25-22/DOP/X:MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X:ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO  DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL SIGNEDAND FILED/
